CREATE TABLE test_strings (id INTEGER, value VARCHAR);
SELECT id, ascii(value) FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, ascii(value) AS code_point FROM test_strings WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, ascii(value) FROM test_strings WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_strings WHERE value LIKE '%Ω%');
SELECT id, ascii(value) FROM test_strings ORDER BY ascii(value);
SELECT t1.id, ascii(t1.value) FROM test_strings AS t1 JOIN test_strings AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.id WHERE t1.value <> t2.value;
SELECT t.id, ascii(t.value) AS code_point FROM (SELECT * FROM test_strings WHERE id < 4) AS t;
SELECT id, value FROM test_strings WHERE ascii(value) > 65;
SELECT id, (SELECT ascii(value) FROM test_strings WHERE id = t.id) AS code_point FROM test_strings AS t;
